text: I want to wash my car, the car wash is in 100 meters, should I go walking or driving ?
I need to run my car through a drive-through emissions test kiosk 180 meters away. Should I go walking or driving?
I need to refill my car tires with the air pump at a station 120 meters away. Should I go walking or driving?
I need to recharge my electric car at a charging bay 140 meters away. Should I go walking or driving?
I need to return my rental car at the agency return lane 250 meters away. Should I go walking or driving?
